THE REAR SEAT BELTS RECOGNIZE SOMEONE IS IN THE BACK SEAT WHEN THERE IS NOTHING IN THE BACK SEAT. THE SEAT BELTS HAVE TO BE FASTENED AT ALL TIMES (WITH OR WITHOUT A PASSENGER IN THE BACK SEAT). IF ONE PERSON IS IN THE BACK SEAT BUCKED, THE OTHER SPOTS WILL CONTINUOUSLY "DING" UNT

narrative.headline: What 2019 Jeep Renegade owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 77 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (32% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
